product: Foundation model Unity Catalog permissions is generally available ​
tagline: June 5, 2026 [Foundation model Unity Catalog permissions](/aws/en/machine learning/foundation model apis/model uc permissions) is now [generally available](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
what_it_does: June 5, 2026 [Foundation model Unity Catalog permissions](/aws/en/machine learning/foundation model apis/model uc permissions) is now [generally available](/aws/en/release notes/release types). This feature requires enablement by your Databricks account team.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
